title: Saldanhaea myriantha
taxonomy: Saldanhaea myriantha is a species of millipede in the family Sphaerotrichopidae. It belongs to the phylum Arthropoda, class Diplopoda, and order Sphaerotheriida. The species is endemic to South Africa, where it is found in the Western Cape province. Further classification details are available within the family and genus levels. At these levels, Saldanhaea myriantha is placed in the genus Saldanhaea and the family Sphaerotrichopidae.
